candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The diagram above represents the idealized titration curve for the reaction of sodium oxalate ($Na_2C_2O_4$) with a strong acid like hydrochloric acid ($HCl$). E and F represent the pH at the endpoints. G and H will depend on the composition of the sample with the possibility that one may not be present. In addition to water, what are the predominant species in solution at E?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 上图表示草酸钠($\mathrm{Na_2C_2O_4}$)与盐酸($\mathrm{HCl}$)反应的理想化滴定曲线。E和F点分别表示终点处的pH值。G和H点的存在与否将取决于样品的组成。除去水分子外,在E点溶液中的主要物种是什么?
